    1:["增收不增利","信息不对称","风险全景"],2:["公开数据","合规边界","RPA采集"],3:["缺失值","重复值","清洗规则"],4:["供应商集中度","采购单价","证据链"],
    5:["RFM分群","客户集中度","虚假繁荣"],6:["盈利能力","营运效率","杜邦拆解"],7:["现金流","回款周期","资金链"],8:["整改清单","答辩质询","交付质量"]
  };
  const kws=kwMap[tid]||["问题识别","数据证据","整改建议"];
  const answer=complete?`本组围绕“${TRAIN_CONTENT[tid].mid.discussion.replace('小组讨论：','').replace('提交小组共识。','')}”形成共识：应从${kws.join('、')}三个角度验证，先用数据定位异常，再用业务流程解释原因，最后提出可执行整改建议。`:"暂未提交小组讨论答案。";
  const ai=!complete?"AI未能分析：缺少小组讨论文本。":score>=75?`AI分析：答案能体现${kws[0]}与${kws[1]}，讨论结论有数据指向，建议继续补充责任部门和整改周期。`:score>=60?`AI分析：讨论方向基本正确，但${kws[2]}不足，建议补充原始数据截图、计算口径和小组分工记录。`:`AI分析：讨论偏现象描述，缺少数据验证和业务解释，建议教师追问“证据从哪里来、结论如何验证”。`;
  return {complete,score,ar,kws,answer,ai};
}
function midTaskStats(tid){
  const workRows=STUDENTS.map(s=>trainRecord(s,tid,"mid"));
  const discussions=GROUPS.map((_,gi)=>midGroupDiscussion(gi,tid));
  const done=workRows.filter(r=>r.complete).length;
  const discussDone=discussions.filter(d=>d.complete).length;
  const needFocus=workRows.filter(r=>!r.complete||r.score<75).length;
  return {
    done,rate:Math.round(done/STUDENTS.length*100),
    avgScore:Math.round(avg(workRows.filter(r=>r.complete).map(r=>r.score))||0),
    a:workRows.filter(r=>r.ar==="A").length,
    rework:workRows.filter(r=>r.ar==="R").length,
    discussDone,discussRate:Math.round(discussDone/GROUPS.length*100),
    needFocus
  };
}

/* 符老师 · 任务二 数据清洗 · 课中实训定制数据 */
function fuTask2MidRecord(s){
  if(s.name==="秦嘉蔚"){
    return {complete:true,score:100,ar:"A",signal:"强信号",rate:"100%",comment:"数据来源标注率达到100%，外部信息收集机器人运行截图与流程文件完整，数据来源、采集时间和来源网址均能对应追溯，属于强信号。"};
  }
  if(s.name==="马丹妮"){
    return {complete:true,score:48,ar:"R",signal:"弱信号",rate:"42%",comment:"提交的数据缺失了“来源网址”字段，无法验证外部信息来源，证据链不完整，标记为弱信号，需补充来源网址后返工。"};
  }
  const base=taskScore(s,2);
  const h=strHash("fu-task2-mid-"+s.name);
  const score=clamp(base+((h%21)-9));
  const ar=score>=85?"A":score>=70?"待完善":score>=60?"待完善":"R";
  const signal=score>=85?"强信号":score>=70?"成长信号":"弱信号";
  const rate=clamp(score+((h%9)-4))+"%";
  const comments={
    "A":`数据来源标注率为${rate}，运行截图、流程文件和采集字段较完整，能够说明外部信息来源，属于${signal}。`,
    "待完善":`数据来源标注率为${rate}，已提交外部信息收集机器人运行截图或流程文件，但部分字段标注不够细，建议补充来源网址、采集时间和字段说明。`,
    "R":`数据来源标注率为${rate}，提交材料证据链不足，建议补充来源网址、字段口径和运行日志后重新提交。`
  };
  return {complete:true,score,ar,signal,rate,comment:comments[ar]};
}
function fuTask2MidProductFile(s){
  return s.name==="秦嘉蔚"?`外部信息收集机器人_${s.name}.xaml / 运行截图_满分.png`:
    s.name==="马丹妮"?`外部信息收集机器人_${s.name}.png（缺少来源网址字段）`:
    `外部信息收集机器人_${s.name}.xaml / 运行截图.png`;
}
function fuTask2SignalBadge(rec){
  const color=rec.signal==="强信号"?"var(--strong)":rec.signal==="弱信号"?"var(--weak)":"var(--growth)";
  const bg=rec.signal==="强信号"?"#dcfaf4":rec.signal==="弱信号"?"#fde6e9":"#fdf0dc";
  return `<span class="lv-pill" style="background:${bg};color:${color}"><span class="d" style="background:${color}"></span>${rec.signal}</span>`;
}
function renderFuTask2MidTraining(){
  destroyCharts();
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const rows=STUDENTS.map(s=>({s,rec:fuTask2MidRecord(s),disc:midGroupDiscussion(s.group,2)})).sort((a,b)=>b.rec.score-a.rec.score || a.s.name.localeCompare(b.s.name,"zh-CN"));
  const done=rows.filter(x=>x.rec.complete).length;
  const avgScore=Math.round(avg(rows.map(x=>x.rec.score)));
  const strong=rows.filter(x=>x.rec.signal==="强信号").length;
  const weak=rows.filter(x=>x.rec.signal==="弱信号").length;
  const groupRows=GROUPS.map((g,gi)=>({g,gi,disc:midGroupDiscussion(gi,2)}));
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 课业实训管理 / 符老师 / 课中实训</div><h2>任务二 数据清洗 · 课中实训数据</h2><p>符老师当前教学任务为任务二。本页面只显示任务二课中实训数据：学生课堂作品提交、外部信息收集机器人运行截图或流程文件、AI分析和信号标记。</p></div>
    ${phaseChipsHTML()}
    ${teacherTrainTaskChipsHTML()}
    <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;border-color:#b9ece2;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#e9faf6,#fff)">
      <div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 当前仅查看：任务二 数据清洗</h3><span class="tag teal">符老师 · 课中实训</span></div>
      <p class="helper" style="color:var(--ink-2)"><b>课堂作业：</b>提交外部信息收集机器人运行截图或流程文件。<br><b>AI分析重点：</b>检查数据来源标注率、来源网址字段、采集字段完整性、运行截图与流程文件是否可追溯。<br><b>课堂评价逻辑：</b>数据来源可追溯且字段完整为强信号；缺失来源网址、无法核验来源为弱信号。</p>
    </div>
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>✅ 作品提交率</label><div class="v">100<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">${done}/${STUDENTS.length}人提交课堂作品</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>📊 平均得分</label><div class="v">${avgScore}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend flat">外部信息收集机器人</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>⭐ 强信号</label><div class="v">${strong}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend up">秦嘉蔚满分</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🚩 弱信号</label><div class="v">${weak}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">马丹妮需返工</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 课堂作品信号分布</h3><span class="sub">任务二 · 数据来源标注率</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="fuTask2Signal"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🍋 AI总体分析</h3><span class="tag teal">任务二</span></div>
        <div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">课堂数据判断</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:var(--teal)">${avgScore}分</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px">本次课中实训主要检测学生是否能够通过外部信息收集机器人规范采集信息，并标注数据来源。秦嘉蔚数据来源标注率达到100%，属于强信号；马丹妮提交数据缺失“来源网址”字段，来源不可追溯，标记为弱信号。</p></div>
        <div class="res-list"><div class="res"><span class="pic">1</span>检查是否提交机器人运行截图或流程文件<span class="go">作品证据</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">2</span>检查是否保留来源网址字段<span class="go">来源追溯</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">3</span>检查数据来源标注率是否达标<span class="go">AI分析</span></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 学生课堂作品与AI分析明细</h3><span class="sub">任务二 · 符老师课中实训 · 按AI初评分降序排列</span></div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门/角色</th><th>完成情况</th><th>学生提交作品</th><th>AI初评分</th><th>数据来源标注率</th><th>信号判断</th><th>AI分析</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>
      ${rows.map(({s,rec})=>`<tr><td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td><td style="color:var(--ink-2)"><b>${GROUPS[s.group]}</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</span></td><td><span class="status-pill done">已完成</span></td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:250px">${fuTask2MidProductFile(s)}</td><td class="sc-num" style="color:${rec.score===100?'var(--strong)':rec.score<60?'var(--weak)':'var(--ink)'}">${rec.score}</td><td class="sc-num">${rec.rate}</td><td>${fuTask2SignalBadge(rec)}</td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:390px">${rec.comment}</td><td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">画像</button></td></tr>`).join("")}
      </tbody></table></div></div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>💬 小组讨论提交答案与AI分析</h3><span class="sub">任务二 · 数据来源可追溯</span></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px" class="col-2">
        ${groupRows.map(({g,gi,disc})=>`<div class="weak-item" style="margin-bottom:0"><div class="top"><span class="name">${g}</span><span>${disc.complete?`<span class="score-pill" style="color:${disc.score>=75?'var(--strong)':'var(--growth)'}">${disc.score}分</span>`:'<span class="status-pill pend">未提交</span>'}</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>项目经理：</b>${groupLeaderName(gi)}<br><b>组员：</b>${groupMembersLine(gi)}</p><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>提交答案：</b>本组认为外部信息收集机器人运行后，必须保留来源网址、采集时间、字段口径和网页截图，确保数据来源可追溯。</p><div class="res-list"><div class="res"><span class="pic">#</span>来源网址<span class="go">关键词</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">#</span>采集时间<span class="go">关键词</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">#</span>字段完整性<span class="go">关键词</span></div></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:10px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>AI分析：</b>讨论能围绕数据来源标注和证据链展开，建议继续补充“缺失来源网址时如何返工”的处理规则。</p></div>`).join("")}
      </div>
    </div>`;
  const counts=[rows.filter(x=>x.rec.signal==="强信号").length,rows.filter(x=>x.rec.signal==="成长信号").length,rows.filter(x=>x.rec.signal==="弱信号").length];
  mkBar("fuTask2Signal",["强信号","成长信号","弱信号"],[{label:"人数",data:counts,backgroundColor:["#16b884","#f4a52c","#ef5a6a"],borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:Math.max(...counts)+3});
}

/* ===== 解老师·任务八报告路演·课中实训成果提交与成绩评定 ===== */
const XIE_TASK8_RESULTS=[
  {dept:"第一审计部", group:0, score:91, mentor:93, teacher:91, peer:89, grade:"A", note:"“利润被什么吃掉”讲得透、证据可追溯", rectify:"继续压缩路演时间，保留最有说服力的利润侵蚀证据。"},
  {dept:"第二审计部", group:1, score:88, mentor:90, teacher:88, peer:85, grade:"A", note:"数据治理规范、AI 使用全程留痕", rectify:"补充AI复核记录与人工判断的对应关系。"},
  {dept:"第三审计部", group:2, score:90, mentor:92, teacher:90, peer:88, grade:"A", note:"红绿预警看板用心、替客户着想", rectify:"进一步说明预警阈值设置依据。"},
  {dept:"第四审计部", group:3, score:79, mentor:80, teacher:78, peer:79, grade:"R", note:"建议尚停在原则层面，落地抓手不足", rectify:"把整改建议拆成责任人、时间表、验证指标。"},
  {dept:"第五审计部", group:4, score:87, mentor:88, teacher:87, peer:86, grade:"A", note:"RPA 建议可落地，需补“先试点”前置", rectify:"增加先试点、再推广的实施路径。"},
  {dept:"第六审计部", group:5, score:82, mentor:84, teacher:81, peer:80, grade:"R", note:"存货减值证据未闭环，需补充核实", rectify:"补充存货库龄、跌价测试和盘点核实证据。"},
];
function xieTask8GradeBadge(g){
  return g==="A"?`<span class="ar-badge ar-A">A级</span>`:`<span class="ar-badge ar-R">R级</span>`;
}
function renderXieTask8MidTraining(){
  destroyCharts();
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const avgScore=Math.round(avg(XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.map(x=>x.score)));
  const aCount=XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.filter(x=>x.grade==="A").length;
  const rCount=XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.filter(x=>x.grade==="R").length;
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 课业实训管理 / 解老师 / 课中实训</div>
      <h2>任务八 报告路演 · 课中实训成果</h2>
      <p>解老师当前教学任务为任务八。本页面显示六个审计部课前已上传的路演成果包，并可点击“成绩评定”查看六个小组综合得分、A/R定级、定级说明和整改方向。</p></div>
    ${phaseChipsHTML()}
    ${teacherTrainTaskChipsHTML()}
    <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;border-color:#cfe0ff;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#eef3ff,#fff)">
      <div class="card-h"><h3>📦 课前已上传成果包</h3><button class="btn primary" id="xieGradeBtn">成绩评定</button></div>
      <p class="helper" style="color:var(--ink-2)">
        六个审计部均已在课前提交：《ST汽车公司数字化内控优化咨询报告》、路演PPT、Power BI看板和备询附件。
        课中实训主要围绕“报告路演—导师质询—A/R定级—整改方向”开展。
      </p>
    </div>
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>✅ 成果包上传率</label><div class="v">100<small>%</small></div><div class="trend up">6/6个审计部已提交</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>📊 综合平均分</label><div class="v">${avgScore}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend flat">报告+PPT+看板+答辩</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>🅰️ A级交付</label><div class="v">${aCount}<small> 组</small></div><div class="trend up">达到合格交付标准</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🆁 需整改</label><div class="v">${rCount}<small> 组</small></div><div class="trend flat">需按批注补证据链</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 六个审计部综合得分</h3><span class="sub">点击成绩评定查看明细</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="xieTask8Scores"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🍋 AI总体分析</h3><span class="tag teal">报告路演</span></div>
        <div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">成果交付判断</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:var(--teal)">${avgScore}分</span></div>
          <p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px">六个审计部均完成报告、PPT、Power BI看板和备询附件上传。A级小组整体证据链较完整，能够把数据异常转化为客户可理解的整改建议；R级小组主要问题集中在建议落地性不足、存货减值证据链未闭环。</p></div>
        <div class="res-list">
          <div class="res"><span class="pic">1</span>报告结论是否能回溯到数据证据<span class="go">证据链</span></div>
          <div class="res"><span class="pic">2</span>Power BI看板是否支持风险解释<span class="go">可视化</span></div>
          <div class="res"><span class="pic">3</span>备询附件是否能支撑导师质询<span class="go">答辩准备</span></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>📁 六个审计部课前上传明细</h3><span class="sub">报告、PPT、看板、备询附件均已上传</span></div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
        <thead><tr><th>审计部</th><th>项目经理</th><th>成员</th><th>咨询报告</th><th>路演PPT</th><th>Power BI看板</th><th>备询附件</th><th>上传状态</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${GROUPS.map((g,gi)=>`<tr>
            <td><b>${g}</b></td>
            <td>${groupLeaderName(gi)}</td>
            <td style="color:var(--ink-2);font-size:12px;max-width:290px">${groupMembersLine(gi)}</td>
            <td><span class="status-pill done">已上传</span><br><span class="helper">ST汽车公司数字化内控优化咨询报告.docx</span></td>
            <td><span class="status-pill done">已上传</span><br><span class="helper">路演PPT.pptx</span></td>
            <td><span class="status-pill done">已上传</span><br><span class="helper">Power BI风险看板.pbix</span></td>
            <td><span class="status-pill done">已上传</span><br><span class="helper">导师备询附件.zip</span></td>
            <td><span class="ar-badge ar-A">完整</span></td>
          </tr>`).join("")}
        </tbody>
      </table></div>
    </div>`;
  mkBar("xieTask8Scores",XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.map(x=>x.dept.replace("审计部","部")),[{label:"综合得分",data:XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.map(x=>x.score),backgroundColor:XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.map(x=>x.grade==="A"?"#16b884":"#ef5a6a"),borderRadius:8}],{legend:false,max:100});
}
function openXieTask8GradeModal(){
  document.getElementById("modalBody").innerHTML=`
    <button class="x">✕</button>
    <div class="page-head" style="margin-bottom:16px"><div class="crumb">任务八 报告路演 / 成绩评定</div><h2 style="font-size:21px">六个审计部成绩评定与整改方向</h2></div>
    <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>审计部</th><th>综合得分</th><th>A/R定级</th><th>定级说明</th><th>整改方向说明</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>
        ${XIE_TASK8_RESULTS.map(x=>`<tr>
          <td><b>${x.dept}</b><br><span class="helper">项目经理：${groupLeaderName(x.group)}</span></td>
          <td class="sc-num" title="企业导师评分：${x.mentor}分（占40%）&#10;任课教师评分：${x.teacher}分（占30%）&#10;小组互评平均分：${x.peer}分（占30%）" style="font-size:16px;color:${x.grade==="A"?"var(--strong)":"var(--weak)"};cursor:help;text-decoration:underline dotted;text-underline-offset:4px">${x.score}</td>
          <td>${xieTask8GradeBadge(x.grade)}</td>
          <td style="color:var(--ink-2);max-width:310px">${x.note}</td>
          <td><span class="tag ${x.grade==="A"?"blue":"lemon"}" style="display:inline-block;white-space:normal;line-height:1.6">${x.rectify}</span></td>
        </tr>`).join("")}
      </tbody>
    </table></div></div>`;
  document.getElementById("modalMask").classList.add("show");
}

function renderTeacherTraining(){
  const ph=TRAIN_PHASES.find(x=>x.key===state.trainingPhase)||TRAIN_PHASES[0];
  const t=TASKS.find(x=>x.id===state.trainingTask)||TASKS[0];
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  if(TEACHERS[state.teacherId] && TEACHERS[state.teacherId].name==="凌老师" && ph.key==="pre" && t.id===3){renderLingTask3PreTraining();return;}
  if(TEACHERS[state.teacherId] && TEACHERS[state.teacherId].name==="符老师" && ph.key==="mid"){renderFuTask2MidTraining();return;}
  if(TEACHERS[state.teacherId] && TEACHERS[state.teacherId].name==="解老师" && ph.key==="mid"){renderXieTask8MidTraining();return;}

  if(ph.key==="mid"){
    destroyCharts();
    const stats=midTaskStats(t.id);
    const rows=STUDENTS.map(s=>({s,rec:trainRecord(s,t.id,"mid"),disc:midGroupDiscussion(s.group,t.id)}));
    const groupRows=GROUPS.map((g,gi)=>({g,gi,disc:midGroupDiscussion(gi,t.id)}));
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 课业实训管理 / 课中实训</div><h2>课中实训 · 当前任务数据</h2><p>本界面按任务过滤，切换任务后只显示该任务的课中数据：学生完成情况、学生提交作品、小组讨论答案、AI分析与A/R评价，不混合展示其他任务数据。</p></div>
      ${phaseChipsHTML()}
      ${teacherTrainTaskChipsHTML()}
      <div class="card" style="margin-bottom:18px;border-color:#b9ece2;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#e9faf6,#fff)">
        <div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 当前仅查看：${t.name}</h3><span class="tag teal">课中实训数据</span></div>
        <p class="helper" style="color:var(--ink-2)"><b>课堂作品要求：</b>${TRAIN_CONTENT[t.id].mid.product}<br><b>小组讨论要求：</b>${TRAIN_CONTENT[t.id].mid.discussion}<br><b>任务交付物：</b>${TASK_FOCUS[t.id].deliver}</p>
      </div>
      <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>✅ 作品提交率</label><div class="v">${stats.rate}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">${stats.done}/${STUDENTS.length}人提交课堂作品</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>💬 讨论提交率</label><div class="v">${stats.discussRate}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">${stats.discussDone}/${GROUPS.length}组提交答案</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>🅰️ A级作品</label><div class="v">${stats.a}<small> 件</small></div><div class="trend up">可进入强信号证据</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🔍 AI建议关注</label><div class="v">${stats.needFocus}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">未交/低于75分</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 当前任务学生完成分布</h3><span class="sub">只统计${t.short}</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="midTaskStatus"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🍋 AI总体分析</h3><span class="tag teal">${t.short}</span></div>
          <div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">课堂数据判断</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:var(--teal)">${stats.avgScore}分</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px">本任务课堂作品平均分为${stats.avgScore}分，${stats.a}件达到A级，${stats.rework}人需要返工。AI建议教师重点查看未提交、低于75分以及讨论答案缺少证据链的小组。</p></div>
          <div class="res-list"><div class="res"><span class="pic">1</span>先看学生作品是否有截图/文件/运行记录<span class="go">作品证据</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">2</span>再看小组讨论是否能解释数据异常<span class="go">业务解释</span></div><div class="res"><span class="pic">3</span>最后看AI分析中是否提示证据链不足<span class="go">返工依据</span></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 学生课堂作品与AI分析明细</h3><span class="sub">${t.short} · 仅本任务</span></div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
        <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门/角色</th><th>完成情况</th><th>学生提交作品</th><th>AI初评分</th><th>A/R评价</th><th>AI分析</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>
        ${rows.map(({s,rec,disc})=>`<tr><td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td><td style="color:var(--ink-2)"><b>${GROUPS[s.group]}</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</span></td><td>${rec.complete?'<span class="status-pill done">已完成</span>':'<span class="status-pill pend">未完成</span>'}</td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:220px">${rec.complete?midProductFile(s,t.id):'—'}</td><td class="sc-num">${rec.complete?rec.score:'-'}</td><td>${trainBadge(rec)}</td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:360px">${midAIText(s,t.id,rec,disc)}</td><td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">画像</button></td></tr>`).join("")}
        </tbody></table></div></div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>💬 小组讨论提交答案与AI分析</h3><span class="sub">${t.short} · ${GROUPS.length}组</span></div>
        <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:14px" class="col-2">
          ${groupRows.map(({g,gi,disc})=>`<div class="weak-item" style="margin-bottom:0"><div class="top"><span class="name">${g}</span><span>${disc.complete?`<span class="score-pill" style="color:${disc.score>=75?'var(--strong)':'var(--growth)'}">${disc.score}分</span>`:'<span class="status-pill pend">未提交</span>'}</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>项目经理：</b>${groupLeaderName(gi)}<br><b>组员：</b>${groupMembersLine(gi)}</p><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>提交答案：</b>${disc.answer}</p><div class="res-list">${disc.kws.map(k=>`<div class="res"><span class="pic">#</span>${k}<span class="go">关键词</span></div>`).join("")}</div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:10px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>${disc.ai}</b></p></div>`).join("")}
        </div>
      </div>`;
    const statusLabels=["A级","待完善","R级","未完成"];
    const counts=[
      rows.filter(x=>x.rec.ar==="A").length,
      rows.filter(x=>x.rec.ar==="待完善").length,
      rows.filter(x=>x.rec.ar==="R").length,
      rows.filter(x=>!x.rec.complete).length,
    ];
    mkBar("midTaskStatus",statusLabels,[{label:"人数",data:counts,backgroundColor:["#16b884","#f4a52c","#ef5a6a","#8a96ad"],borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:Math.max(...counts)+3});
    return;
  }

  const stats=trainPhaseStats(ph.key,t.id);
  const rows=STUDENTS.map(s=>({s,rec:trainRecord(s,t.id,ph.key),dis:trainRecord(s,t.id,ph.key,"discussion")}));
  const allTaskStats=TRAIN_TASK_TABS.map(x=>trainPhaseStats(ph.key,x.sourceId));
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 课业实训管理</div><h2>课业实训管理</h2><p>统一查看学生课前云训、课后岗训完成情况。课中实训已按任务单独过滤，可查看学生作品、小组讨论答案与AI分析。</p></div>
    ${phaseChipsHTML()}
    ${teacherTrainTaskChipsHTML()}
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>✅ 完成率</label><div class="v">${stats.rate}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">${stats.done}/${STUDENTS.length}人完成</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>📊 平均分</label><div class="v">${stats.avgScore}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend flat">AI初评+教师复核</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>🅰️ A级成果</label><div class="v">${stats.a}<small> 件</small></div><div class="trend up">可纳入强信号</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🆁 需返工</label><div class="v">${stats.rework}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">重点辅导名单</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📈 ${ph.label} · 各任务完成率/平均分</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="trainPhaseBar"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 当前任务说明</h3><span class="tag ${ph.key==='pre'?'blue':'lemon'}">${t.short}</span></div>
        <div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">${TRAIN_CONTENT[t.id][ph.key].title}</span><span class="status-pill done">${ph.label}</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px">${TRAIN_CONTENT[t.id][ph.key].work}</p></div>
        <p class="helper">教师可依据学生提交物、AI分析、A/R等级进行复核，批改结果将回写到学生成长画像和过程数据。</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 学生完成与评价明细</h3><span class="sub">${ph.label} · ${t.short}</span></div><div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
      <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门/角色</th><th>完成状态</th><th>AI初评分</th><th>A/R评价</th><th>教师评价摘要</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>
      ${rows.map(({s,rec})=>`<tr><td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td><td style="color:var(--ink-2)"><b>${GROUPS[s.group]}</b><br><span style="font-size:12px">${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</span></td><td>${rec.complete?'<span class="status-pill done">已完成</span>':'<span class="status-pill pend">未完成</span>'}</td><td class="sc-num">${rec.complete?rec.score:'-'}</td><td>${trainBadge(rec)}</td><td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:360px">${rec.comment}</td><td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">画像</button></td></tr>`).join("")}
      </tbody></table></div></div>`;
  mkBar("trainPhaseBar",TRAIN_TASK_TABS.map(x=>x.short),[
    {label:"完成率%",data:allTaskStats.map(x=>x.rate),backgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderRadius:6},
    {label:"平均分",data:allTaskStats.map(x=>x.avgScore),backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
  ]);
}


/* 学生端：诊断与提升（短板诊断 + 知识图谱点亮合并） */
function renderStudentDiag(){
  destroyCharts();
  const s=STUDENTS[state.studentId];
  const ws=weaknessesOf(s);
  const weakHTML=ws.length? ws.map(w=>`
    <div class="weak-item">
      <div class="top"><span class="name">${w.icon} ${w.label}</span>
        <span><span class="sev ${w.sev}">${w.sev==="high"?"重点突破":"待加强"}</span> <span class="score-pill" style="color:${w.sev==="high"?"var(--weak)":"var(--growth)"}">${w.score}</span></span></div>
      <div class="res-list">${w.res.map(r=>`<div class="res"><span class="pic">▶</span>${r}<span class="go">去练习</span></div>`).join("")}</div>
    </div>`).join("") : `<div class="no-weak"><div class="big">🎉</div><b>各项能力均达到岗位达标线</b><br><span class="helper">继续保持，挑战更高阶的咨询报告与答辩任务。</span></div>`;
  document.getElementById("main").innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 诊断与提升</div><h2>诊断与提升：短板补强 + 知识图谱点亮</h2><p>本界面把“短板诊断与提升”和“知识图谱点亮”合并展示：先看哪里弱，再看哪些知识点、能力点、素养点还没有点亮。</p></div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔍 短板诊断与资源推荐（${ws.length}项）</h3><span class="sub">低于72分自动预警</span></div>${weakHTML}</div>
      <div>${kmapHeaderHTML(s,"我的")}</div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 330px;gap:18px;margin-top:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>💡 知识图谱点亮</h3><span class="sub">点击灯泡查看AI提升建议</span></div>${kmapGridHTML(s)}</div>
      <div>${kmapTipHTML(s)}</div>
    </div>`;
  mkGauge("kRing",Math.round(litCount(s)/KALL.length*100),"#f5b400");
}

/* ============================================================
   学生端
   ============================================================ */
function renderStudent(){
  const s=STUDENTS[state.studentId];
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  if(state.nav==="kmap"){renderStudentKmap();return;}
  if(state.nav==="training"){renderStudentTraining();return;}
  if(state.nav==="diag"){renderStudentDiag();return;}
  if(state.nav==="overview"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 成长画像</div>
        <h2>你好，${s.name} 👋</h2><p>这里已把个人画像、岗位能力雷达、全链路成长曲线合并展示，形成一个完整的成长诊断页。</p></div>
      ${profileHTML(s,"self")}`;
    mountProfile(s,"self");
  }
  else if(state.nav==="radar"){
    const rl=["财务指标分析","杜邦分析","业务流程认知","数字化内控","数据模型理论","RPA采集","Power Query清洗","DAX建模","风险识别","报告路演","数据合规","职业怀疑","诚信执业","团队协作"];
    const cur=[s.met.finReport,s.met.dupont,s.met.bizFlow,s.met.internalControl,s.met.modelTheory,s.met.rpa,s.met.powerQuery,s.met.dax,s.riskAnalysis,s.met.report,s.met.compliance,s.met.skepticism,s.met.integrity,s.met.teamwork];
    const pre=cur.map(v=>clamp(v-(13+(v%8))));
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 能力雷达诊断</div><h2>能力雷达诊断</h2><p>覆盖知识·能力·素养三维 14 项岗位能力，蓝线为当前信号，虚线为课前基线。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.2fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 14项能力全景雷达</h3></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="bigRadar"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 三维达成对比</h3><span class="sub">你 vs 班级 vs 岗位标准</span></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="dimCmp"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>`;
    mkRadar("bigRadar",rl,cur,pre);
    mkBar("dimCmp",["知识","能力","素养"],[
      {label:"我的得分",data:[s.knowledge,s.ability,s.literacy],backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"班级均值",data:[classAvg("knowledge"),classAvg("ability"),classAvg("literacy")],backgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"岗位标准",data:[80,80,80],backgroundColor:"#ffd23d",borderRadius:6},
    ]);
  }
  else if(state.nav==="growth"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 全链路成长曲线</div><h2>全链路成长曲线</h2><p>「采→治→析→报」八大任务的信号分变化。★ 标记为本学期课堂展示任务。</p></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📈 综合信号分演进（任务一 → 任务八）</h3><span class="tag demo">★ 课堂展示：采集 · 清洗 · 销售分析 · 报告路演</span></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="growthLine"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>🧭 各任务信号增幅</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="growthBar"></canvas></div></div>`;
    mkLine("growthLine",TASKS.map(t=>t.short),s.curve,[1,2,4,7]);
    const gains=s.curve.map((v,i)=>i===0?0:v-s.curve[i-1]);
    mkBar("growthBar",TASKS.map(t=>t.short),[{label:"较上一任务增幅",data:gains,backgroundColor:gains.map(g=>g>=0?"#16b884":"#ef5a6a"),borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:Math.max(...gains)+4});
  }
  else if(state.nav==="weak"){
    const ws=weaknessesOf(s);
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 短板诊断与提升</div><h2>短板诊断与精准补强</h2><p>平台自动识别低于岗位达标线（72分）的能力项，并推送针对性学习资源与专项练习，形成「诊断→训练→再评价」闭环。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔍 识别到的短板（${ws.length}项）</h3></div>
          ${ws.length? ws.map(w=>`
            <div class="weak-item">
              <div class="top"><span class="name">${w.icon} ${w.label}</span>
                <span><span class="sev ${w.sev}">${w.sev==="high"?"重点突破":"待加强"}</span> <span class="score-pill" style="color:${w.sev==="high"?"var(--weak)":"var(--growth)"}">${w.score}</span></span></div>
              <div class="res-list">${w.res.map(r=>`<div class="res"><span class="pic">▶</span>${r}<span class="go">去练习</span></div>`).join("")}</div>
            </div>`).join("")
          : `<div class="no-weak"><div class="big">🎉</div><b>各项能力均达到岗位达标线</b><br><span class="helper">继续保持，向准岗位员工冲刺！</span></div>`}
        </div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📌 提升优先级</h3><span class="sub">能力维度权重最高（45%）</span></div>
          <div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="weakBar"></canvas></div>
          <p class="helper" style="margin-top:12px">建议优先攻克能力维度短板：每提升能力分对综合信号分贡献最大。完成专项练习后，平台将自动重新评价并刷新你的信号等级。</p>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    const all=WEAK_DEFS.map(d=>({lbl:d.label.replace(/能力弱|不足|弱/g,"").slice(0,6),v:s.met[d.key]}));
    mkBar("weakBar",all.map(a=>a.lbl),[{label:"当前得分",data:all.map(a=>a.v),backgroundColor:all.map(a=>a.v<60?"#ef5a6a":a.v<72?"#f4a52c":"#16b884"),borderRadius:6}],{legend:false});
  }
  else if(state.nav==="data"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 学习数据采集</div><h2>学习数据采集</h2><p>平台持续采集课前测试、课后测试、作业、项目报告、平台提问、课堂任务、企业导师评价、小组互评等过程数据，把你的学习过程「看见」。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🗂️ 八类学习数据来源</h3><span class="sub">过程性评价</span></div>
          ${s.ds.map(d=>`<div class="ds-row"><div class="nm">${d.nm}</div><div class="track"><i style="width:${d.v}%"></i></div><div class="vv">${d.v}</div></div>`).join("")}
        </div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 过程数据雷达</h3></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="dsRadar"></canvas></div>
          <p class="helper" style="margin-top:10px">数据来源越均衡、过程表现越扎实，发出的信号越「纯净可信」。企业导师评价与小组互评共同构成你的真实交付证据。</p>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    const ctx=document.getElementById("dsRadar");
    charts["dsRadar"]=new Chart(ctx,{type:"radar",data:{labels:s.ds.map(d=>d.nm),datasets:[{label:"过程数据",data:s.ds.map(d=>d.v),backgroundColor:"rgba(22,182,164,.16)",borderColor:"#16b6a4",pointBackgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderWidth:2}]},options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,plugins:{legend:{display:false}},scales:{r:{min:0,max:100,ticks:{stepSize:25,backdropColor:"transparent",color:"#8a96ad",font:{size:10}},grid:{color:"#e5ecf5"},angleLines:{color:"#e5ecf5"},pointLabels:{font:{size:11,family:"PingFang SC"},color:"#5c6a86"}}}}});
  }
  else if(state.nav==="ai"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">学生工作台 / 柠檬AI助教</div><h2>🍋 柠檬AI助教</h2><p>问我关于审计行业、审计知识、法律法规、职业道德、本课程的问题。我也会结合你的学习数据给出个性化建议。</p></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="chat">
        <div class="chat-log" id="chatLog"></div>
        <div class="chat-suggest" id="chatSugg"></div>
        <div class="chat-in"><input id="chatInput" placeholder="例如：我的短板该怎么补？什么是职业怀疑？" /><button id="chatSend">发送</button></div>
      </div></div>`;
    initChat(s);
  }
}

/* ============================================================
   柠檬AI助教（基于规则的演示问答）
   ============================================================ */
function aiReply(q,s){
  const ws=weaknessesOf(s);
  const t=q.toLowerCase();
  const has=arr=>arr.some(k=>q.includes(k)||t.includes(k));
  if(has(["短板","怎么补","怎么提升","该学","提升","薄弱","我该"])){
    if(!ws.length) return `你目前各项能力都达到了岗位达标线，<b>当前综合信号分 ${s.composite}</b>，已是${levelOf(s.composite).name}。建议向准岗位员工冲刺：把咨询报告与路演答辩打磨到可直接交付的水平。`;
    const top=ws[0];
    return `结合你的学习数据，最该优先攻克的是 <b>${top.label}（${top.score}分）</b>。给你三个专项：①${top.res[0]}；②${top.res[1]}；③${top.res[2]}。能力维度在综合信号分里权重最高（45%），补它最划算。`;
  }
  if(has(["柠檬","信号","信息不对称"])) return `「柠檬市场」讲的是信息不对称——企业看不清你到底行不行，能力强但没证据也会被低估。本平台就是帮你把学习过程、项目成果、技能表现<b>数据化、可视化、证据化</b>，让你向岗位发出清晰的「强信号」。`;
  if(has(["职业怀疑"])) return `职业怀疑就是<b>不盲从报表、不盲信 AI 结论</b>。比如销售额涨 20% 但现金流紧张，就要追问是不是压货虚增；对 AI 生成的 DAX 结果要交叉验证、能下钻到明细。建议做「AI 结论找错」和异常凭证识别训练。`;
  if(has(["power query","清洗","pq","脏数据","缺失","重复"])) return `Power Query 清洗的五步：链接→探查→规则→清洗→加载。常见操作：替换值、拆分列、填充、删除重复项、合并查询。多表关联记住「拼图法」——事实表配维度表，关联键要唯一无歧义，否则会数据膨胀。`;
  if(has(["dax","calculate","度量值","建模","上下文"])) return `DAX 核心是 CALCULATE，可以把它想成一个能改筛选条件的「高级筛子」。先掌握 SUM，再练 CALCULATE+FILTER/ALL。难点是<b>上下文转换</b>，建议从「2023年采购总额」「应付账款周转天数」这类有业务含义的度量值练起。`;
  if(has(["rfm","客户","销售分析","分群","价值客户"])) return `RFM 用最近消费(R)、消费频率(F)、消费金额(M)给客户分层。重点辨析「重要价值客户」与「重要挽留客户」(R低F高M高)，并识别客户集中度风险。警惕「虚假繁荣」：销量涨但老客户在流失、低质量客户占比高。`;
  if(has(["数据安全法","合规","隐私","密码"])) return `数据合规是审计的红线：①网银密码绝不能在 Excel 或代码里明文存储，要用 SecureString；②采集数据要守《数据安全法》，不爬取个人隐私；③权限最小化。合规意识是「信号净化」的关键一环。`;
  if(has(["采购","供应商"])) return `采购风险看：采购总额、平均采购单价、付款周期、供应商集中度、关联交易。常见疑点是单一供应商过度依赖、采购单价异常偏高、关联方交易。用 CALCULATE+ALL 算占比，再下钻到明细核验。`;
  if(has(["资金","现金流","回款","增收不增利"])) return `资金分析关注现金流、回款周期、资金链健康度。「增收不增利、卖得越多越缺钱」往往指向回款变慢、存货积压或成本异常。要把销售、采购、资金三端联动起来诊断。`;
  if(has(["报告","路演","答辩","咨询"])) return `咨询报告按「问题—数据—分析—结论—建议」结构写，结论要可追溯到明细。路演 90 秒讲清「问题—数据—成果—强信号」。答辩要能接受质询、说明依据、提出改进——这是从分析师走向咨询顾问的关键。`;
  if(has(["A级","R级","评价","考核"])) return `本课程用 ISO 9001 的 A/R 分级：A级（Audit 审计级，合格交付）、R级（Re-work 返工级）。审计底稿没有「60分万岁」，不合格就要重做——这是底线思维，倒逼你追求高质量交付。`;
  if(has(["你好","在吗","hi","hello"])) return `你好，${s.name}！我是柠檬AI助教 🍋。你可以问我课程知识、审计法规、职业道德，或者直接问「我的短板该怎么补」，我会结合你的数据回答。`;
  return `这是个好问题。我可以帮你解读：①课程技能（Power Query / DAX / RFM / RPA）；②审计风险（采购 / 销售 / 资金）；③职业素养（职业怀疑 / 数据合规 / 诚信执业）；④你的个人短板与提升路径。试着更具体地问我，比如「DAX 的 CALCULATE 怎么用」。`;
}
function pushMsg(role,html){
  const log=document.getElementById("chatLog");
  const d=document.createElement("div");d.className="msg "+role;d.innerHTML=html;log.appendChild(d);log.scrollTop=log.scrollHeight;
}
function initChat(s){
  pushMsg("bot",`你好，<b>${s.name}</b>！我是柠檬AI助教 🍋。当前你的综合信号分是 <b>${s.composite}</b>（${levelOf(s.composite).name}）。问我课程知识、审计法规、职业道德，或让我帮你诊断短板。`);
  const sg=["我的短板该怎么补？","什么是职业怀疑？","CALCULATE 怎么用？","什么是柠檬市场？","数据合规有哪些红线？"];
  document.getElementById("chatSugg").innerHTML=sg.map(x=>`<span class="sugg">${x}</span>`).join("");
  const send=()=>{const v=document.getElementById("chatInput").value.trim();if(!v)return;pushMsg("user",v);document.getElementById("chatInput").value="";setTimeout(()=>pushMsg("bot",aiReply(v,s)),250);};
  document.getElementById("chatSend").onclick=send;
  document.getElementById("chatInput").onkeydown=e=>{if(e.key==="Enter")send();};
  document.querySelectorAll(".sugg").forEach(b=>b.onclick=()=>{pushMsg("user",b.textContent);setTimeout(()=>pushMsg("bot",aiReply(b.textContent,s)),250);});
}



function recentProgressList(){
  return [...STUDENTS].map(s=>({s,inc:s.curve[s.curve.length-1]-s.curve[0]})).sort((a,b)=>b.inc-a.inc).slice(0,6);
}


function getStudentByName(name){return STUDENTS.find(s=>s.name===name);} 
const LING_FAST_DATA={
  "徐清婷":{
    pre:[74,90,100],
    post:[68,85,97],
    quality:[72,86,93],
    hours:[3.0,4.8,6.5],
    summary:"第三周前，徐清婷的课前作业已由“能提交”提升到“按时且较完整提交”，课后作业也能补充数据截图和问题依据；在线学习时长连续三周增长，说明她开始主动回看数据清洗微课并对照清单修正。"
  },
  "谭秋云":{
    pre:[78,90,100],
    post:[70,86,98],
    quality:[74,87,94],
    hours:[3.2,4.9,6.8],
    summary:"谭秋云课前问题识别准确率提升明显，第三周已能把利润表、资产负债表、现金流量表分别归类整理；课后作业完整度和在线学习时长同步提升，复盘意识较强。"
  }
};
function lingFocusTaskAvg(taskId){return Math.round(avg(STUDENTS.map(s=>taskScore(s,taskId))));}
function lingFollowCount(){return STUDENTS.filter(s=>taskScore(s,3)<72).length;}
function lingFastGrowthHTML(){
  const names=["徐清婷","谭秋云"];
  return `<div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>🚀 近期进步快的同学</h3><span class="sub">仅统计到第三周，结合课前/课后作业提交与在线学习时长</span></div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:16px">${names.map((name,idx)=>{const stu=getStudentByName(name); const dat=LING_FAST_DATA[name]; const inc=(dat.pre[2]-dat.pre[0])+(dat.post[2]-dat.post[0]);
      return `<div style="border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:18px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff,#f8fbff);padding:18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow)">
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div style="width:62px;height:62px;border-radius:20px;background:${avColor(stu.id)};color:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:24px;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(20,40,80,.14)">${avInit(stu.name)}</div>
          <div style="flex:1;min-width:180px"><div style="font-weight:800;font-size:16px">${stu.name}</div><div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);margin-top:4px">${GROUPS[stu.group]} · ${stu.groupRole||"审计助理"} · 第三周任务三重点跟踪对象</div></div>
          <div style="min-width:120px;text-align:center;padding:10px 14px;border-radius:14px;background:#e9faf6;border:1px solid #bcebdd"><div style="font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:var(--strong)">+${inc}</div><div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-2)">作业进步值</div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.15fr .85fr;gap:16px" class="col-2">
          <div class="card" style="padding:14px"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 课前/课后作业提交与质量</h3><span class="sub">第1周—第3周</span></div><div class="chart-box sm"><canvas id="lingComp${idx}"></canvas></div></div>
          <div class="card" style="padding:14px"><div class="card-h"><h3>⏱️ 在线学习时长</h3><span class="sub">单位：小时</span></div><div class="chart-box sm"><canvas id="lingHour${idx}"></canvas></div></div>
        </div>
        <div class="weak-item" style="margin-top:14px;background:#f6f9fd"><div class="top"><span class="name">📝 近期学习情况分析</span><span class="status-pill done">第三周进步快</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)">${dat.summary}</p><p class="helper" style="margin-top:8px;color:var(--ink-2)"><b>凌老师教学建议：</b>课堂中可请该生分享“先找问题类别，再写检查依据，最后设计Power Query清洗动作”的方法，帮助其他小组把问题清单转化为清洗规则。</p></div>
      </div>`;}).join('')}</div>
    <p class="helper" style="margin-top:12px">说明：凌老师当前授课到第三周，所以本区域只展示第1周至第3周的学习情况，不再展示第四周或后续任务数据。</p>
  </div>`;
}
function mountLingFastGrowthCharts(){
  const names=["徐清婷","谭秋云"];
  names.forEach((name,idx)=>{const dat=LING_FAST_DATA[name];
    mkBar(`lingComp${idx}`,["第1周","第2周","第3周"],[
      {label:"课前作业提交",data:dat.pre,backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"课后作业提交",data:dat.post,backgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"作业质量",data:dat.quality,backgroundColor:"#ffd23d",borderRadius:6}
    ]);
    mkBar(`lingHour${idx}`,["第1周","第2周","第3周"],[
      {label:"在线学习时长(h)",data:dat.hours,backgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderRadius:6}
    ],{max:8});
  });
}
function renderTeacherClassSignalLing(){
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const t=TASKS.find(x=>x.id===3);
  const task3Avg=lingFocusTaskAvg(3);
  const dist=levelDist();
  const rows=[...STUDENTS].map(s=>({s,t3:taskScore(s,3),inc:s.curve[2]-s.curve[0]})).sort((a,b)=>b.t3-a.t3);
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 班级信号分析</div><h2>班级信号分析</h2></div>
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>📅 当前教学周次</label><div class="v">第3<small> 周</small></div><div class="trend flat">任务三 数据清洗</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>🧹 任务三平均达成</label><div class="v">${task3Avg}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend up">数据清洗能力持续提升</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>🚀 重点进步学生</label><div class="v">2<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend up">徐清婷、谭秋云</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🎯 需持续跟进</label><div class="v">${lingFollowCount()}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">任务三得分低于72分</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1.1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📈 第1—3周任务三学习趋势</h3><span class="sub">课前识别—课中清洗—课后巩固</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="lingTaskAvg"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 班级信号等级分布</h3><span class="sub">用于判断分层辅导重点</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="lingDist"></canvas></div></div>
    </div>
    ${lingFastGrowthHTML()}
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 任务三学生信号档案</h3><span class="sub">便于凌老师跟踪数据清洗学习状态</span></div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
        <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门</th><th>角色</th><th>任务三得分</th><th>第1-3周提升</th><th>综合信号分</th><th>重点提示</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${rows.map(({s,t3,inc})=>{const ws=weaknessesOf(s).slice(0,1); const tip=(s.name==="徐清婷"||s.name==="谭秋云")?"第三周进步快，建议课堂表扬并安排经验分享。":(t3<72)?"任务三数据清洗仍需重点辅导。":(ws[0]?`关注${ws[0].label.replace(/能力弱|不足/g,"")}`:"表现稳定，可进入清洗规则优化"); const lv=levelOf(s.composite); return `<tr>
          <td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td>
          <td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${GROUPS[s.group]}</td>
          <td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</td>
          <td class="sc-num">${t3}</td><td class="sc-num" style="color:${inc>=8?'var(--strong)':'var(--growth)'}">+${inc}</td>
          <td><span class="sc-num" style="font-size:15px;color:${lv.hex}">${s.composite}</span></td>
          <td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);max-width:300px">${tip}</td>
          <td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">成长画像</button></td></tr>`;}).join('')}
        </tbody></table></div>
    </div>`;
  mkBar("lingTaskAvg",["第1周 课前问题识别","第2周 清洗规则理解","第3周 质量清单提交"],[{label:"班级平均达成",data:[68,77,task3Avg],backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:8}],{legend:false,max:100});
  mkDoughnut("lingDist",LEVELS.map(L=>`${L.n}（${dist[L.k]}人）`),LEVELS.map(L=>dist[L.k]),LEVELS.map(L=>L.hex));
  mountLingFastGrowthCharts();
}

function progressStudentCards(){
  return `<div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>🚀 近期进步快的同学</h3><span class="sub">依据任务一至当前任务的成长曲线变化自动生成</span></div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:repeat(6,1fr);gap:12px">
      ${recentProgressList().map(({s,inc},idx)=>`<div style="border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#fff,#f6f9fd);padding:14px;text-align:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow)">
        <div style="width:58px;height:58px;border-radius:18px;margin:0 auto 10px;background:${avColor(s.id)};color:#fff;display:grid;place-items:center;font-weight:800;font-size:22px;box-shadow:0 8px 18px rgba(20,40,80,.14)">${avInit(s.name)}</div>
        <div style="font-weight:800;font-size:14px">${idx+1}. ${s.name}</div>
        <div style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2);margin-top:3px">${GROUPS[s.group]} · ${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</div>
        <div style="margin-top:9px;font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:20px;font-weight:800;color:var(--strong)">+${inc}</div>
        <div style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-3)">成长提升值</div>
      </div>`).join("")}
    </div>
    <p class="helper" style="margin-top:12px">说明：这里用头像卡片展示近期进步较快的学生，方便教师及时表扬、安排经验分享或作为同伴帮扶对象。</p>
  </div>`;
}
/* 教师端：班级信号分析（班级信号概览 + 学生信号档案合并） */
function renderTeacherClassSignal(){
  if(TEACHERS[state.teacherId] && TEACHERS[state.teacherId].name==="凌老师"){renderTeacherClassSignalLing();return;}
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const dist=levelDist();
  const above=dist.strong+dist.elite, rework=dist.weak;
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 班级信号分析</div><h2>班级信号分析</h2><p>${CLASS_NAME}（中联学徒班）· ${STUDENTS.length}人。</p></div>
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>👥 班级人数</label><div class="v">${STUDENTS.length}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">6个审计部门</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>📊 平均综合信号分</label><div class="v">${classAvg("composite")}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend up">过程数据持续更新</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>⭐ 强信号及以上</label><div class="v">${Math.round(above/STUDENTS.length*100)}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend up">${above} 人达标</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🚩 待整改学生</label><div class="v">${rework}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">需靶向辅导</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔵 全班信号等级分布</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="csDist"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 班级知识·能力·素养达成</h3><span class="sub">均值 vs 岗位标准线 80</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="csDim"></canvas></div></div>
    </div>
    ${progressStudentCards()}
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 学生信号档案</h3><span class="sub">点击成长画像查看个人详细诊断</span></div>
      <div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
        <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门</th><th>角色</th><th>知识</th><th>能力</th><th>素养</th><th>综合信号分</th><th>信号等级</th><th>主要短板</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${[...STUDENTS].sort((a,b)=>b.composite-a.composite).map(s=>{
          const lv=levelOf(s.composite);const ws=weaknessesOf(s).slice(0,2);
          return `<tr>
            <td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td>
            <td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${GROUPS[s.group]}</td><td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</td>
            <td class="sc-num">${s.knowledge}</td><td class="sc-num">${s.ability}</td><td class="sc-num">${s.literacy}</td>
            <td><span class="sc-num" style="font-size:15px;color:${lv.hex}">${s.composite}</span></td>
            <td><span class="lv-pill" style="background:${lv.hex}18;color:${lv.hex}"><span class="d" style="background:${lv.hex}"></span>${lv.name}</span></td>
            <td><div class="wk-tags">${ws.length?ws.map(w=>`<span class="wk-tag">${w.label.replace(/能力弱|不足/g,"").slice(0,6)}</span>`).join(""):`<span class="wk-ok">✓ 全面达标</span>`}</div></td>
            <td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">成长画像</button></td>
          </tr>`;}).join("")}
        </tbody></table></div>
    </div>`;
  mkDoughnut("csDist",LEVELS.map(L=>`${L.n}（${dist[L.k]}人）`),LEVELS.map(L=>dist[L.k]),LEVELS.map(L=>L.hex));
  mkBar("csDim",["知识","能力","素养"],[
    {label:"班级均值",data:[classAvg("knowledge"),classAvg("ability"),classAvg("literacy")],backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
    {label:"岗位标准",data:[80,80,80],backgroundColor:"#ffd23d",borderRadius:6},
  ]);
}

/* 教师端：班级成长热力（班级短板热力 + 知识图谱合并） */
function renderTeacherClassHeat(){
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const heat=weakHeat();
  const arr=WEAK_DEFS.map(d=>({label:d.label,icon:d.icon,n:heat[d.key]})).sort((a,b)=>b.n-a.n);
  const classOn=Math.round(avg(STUDENTS.map(x=>litCount(x)/KALL.length*100)));
  const classBlock=KMAP.map(t=>{const tk=TASKS.find(x=>x.id===t.task);
    return `<div style="margin-bottom:13px"><div style="font-weight:700;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:5px">${tk.demo?"★ ":""}${tk.name}</div>
      ${t.points.map(p=>{const r=classLitRate(p);const cm=CAT_META[p.cat];
        return `<div class="kpt-row"><div class="knm"><span class="cat-dot" style="background:${cm.c}"></span>${p.name}</div><div class="lit-bar"><i style="width:${r}%"></i></div><div class="kv" style="color:${r<50?'var(--weak)':r<75?'var(--growth)':'var(--strong)'}">${r}%</div></div>`;}).join("")}
    </div>`;}).join("");
  main.innerHTML=`
    <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 班级成长热力</div><h2>班级成长热力</h2><p>已合并“班级短板热力”和“班级知识图谱”：一边看短板人数，一边看知识点、能力点、素养点点亮率。</p></div>
    <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🔥 最高频短板</label><div class="v">${arr[0].n}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">${arr[0].label}</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--lemon-deep)"></div><label>💡 班级平均点亮率</label><div class="v">${classOn}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">共 ${KALL.length} 个能力点</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>📘 知识储备点</label><div class="v">${KALL.filter(p=>p.cat==="k").length}</div><div class="trend flat">教材知识点</div></div>
      <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>🛠️ 能力技术点</label><div class="v">${KALL.filter(p=>p.cat==="a").length}</div><div class="trend flat">岗位技术能力</div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔥 各类短板涉及人数</h3></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="classHeatBar"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📋 教学攻关建议</h3></div>
        ${arr.slice(0,5).map(a=>`<div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">${a.icon} ${a.label}</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:var(--weak)">${a.n}人</span></div><p class="helper" style="margin-top:6px">建议安排共性攻关 / 推送专项资源包，对R级学生启动靶向辅导。</p></div>`).join("")}
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>💡 班级知识图谱点亮热力</h3><span class="sub">点亮率越低，越需在后续课堂重点突破</span></div>${classBlock}</div>`;
  mkBar("classHeatBar",arr.map(a=>a.label.replace(/能力弱|不足/g,"").slice(0,7)),[{label:"涉及人数",data:arr.map(a=>a.n),backgroundColor:"#ef5a6a",borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:STUDENTS.length});
}

/* ============================================================
   教师端
   ============================================================ */
function renderTeacher(){
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  if(state.nav==="class_signal"){renderTeacherClassSignal();return;}
  if(state.nav==="class_heat"){renderTeacherClassHeat();return;}
  if(state.nav==="training"){renderTeacherTraining();return;}
  const dist=levelDist();
  const above=dist.strong+dist.elite, rework=dist.weak;
  if(state.nav==="overview"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 班级信号概览</div><h2>班级信号概览</h2><p>${CLASS_NAME}（中联学徒班）· ${STUDENTS.length}人 · 《财务大数据分析》全链路项目 · 任课教师：${TEACHERS.map(t=>t.name).join("、")}。</p></div>
      <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>👥 班级人数</label><div class="v">${STUDENTS.length}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">学徒制订单班</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>📊 平均综合信号分</label><div class="v">${classAvg("composite")}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend up">▲ 较课前提升明显</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>⭐ 强信号及以上占比</label><div class="v">${Math.round(above/STUDENTS.length*100)}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend up">${above} 人达标</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🚩 待整改（弱信号）</label><div class="v">${rework}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">需靶向辅导</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1.2fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔵 全班信号等级分布</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="tDist"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📊 班级知识·能力·素养达成</h3><span class="sub">均值 vs 岗位标准线 80</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="tDim"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 班级能力雷达（均值）</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="tRadar"></canvas></div></div>`;
    mkDoughnut("tDist",LEVELS.map(L=>`${L.n}（${dist[L.k]}人）`),LEVELS.map(L=>dist[L.k]),LEVELS.map(L=>L.hex));
    mkBar("tDim",["知识","能力","素养"],[
      {label:"班级均值",data:[classAvg("knowledge"),classAvg("ability"),classAvg("literacy")],backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"岗位标准",data:[80,80,80],backgroundColor:"#ffd23d",borderRadius:6},
    ]);
    const rl=["财务指标","DAX建模","PQ清洗","RPA采集","采购风险","销售风险","资金分析","职业怀疑","数据合规","报告路演"];
    const keys=["finReport","dax","powerQuery","rpa","purchaseRisk","salesRisk","cashRisk","skepticism","compliance","report"];
    const cur=keys.map(k=>Math.round(avg(STUDENTS.map(s=>s.met[k]))));
    const pre=cur.map(v=>clamp(v-15));
    mkRadar("tRadar",rl,cur,pre);
  }
  else if(state.nav==="roster"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 学生信号档案</div><h2>学生信号档案</h2><p>点击「成长画像」查看任意学生的完整诊断。表格按综合信号分排序。</p></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table>
        <thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门</th><th>知识</th><th>能力</th><th>素养</th><th>综合信号分</th><th>信号等级</th><th>主要短板</th><th></th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>${[...STUDENTS].sort((a,b)=>b.composite-a.composite).map(s=>{
          const lv=levelOf(s.composite);const ws=weaknessesOf(s).slice(0,2);
          return `<tr>
            <td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td>
            <td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${GROUPS[s.group]}</td>
            <td class="sc-num">${s.knowledge}</td><td class="sc-num">${s.ability}</td><td class="sc-num">${s.literacy}</td>
            <td><span class="sc-num" style="font-size:15px;color:${lv.hex}">${s.composite}</span></td>
            <td><span class="lv-pill" style="background:${lv.hex}18;color:${lv.hex}"><span class="d" style="background:${lv.hex}"></span>${lv.name}</span></td>
            <td><div class="wk-tags">${ws.length?ws.map(w=>`<span class="wk-tag">${w.label.replace(/能力弱|不足/g,"").slice(0,6)}</span>`).join(""):`<span class="wk-ok">✓ 全面达标</span>`}</div></td>
            <td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">成长画像</button></td>
          </tr>`;}).join("")}
        </tbody></table></div></div>`;
  }
  else if(state.nav==="heat"){
    const heat=weakHeat();
    const arr=WEAK_DEFS.map(d=>({label:d.label,icon:d.icon,n:heat[d.key]})).sort((a,b)=>b.n-a.n);
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 班级短板热力</div><h2>班级短板热力分析</h2><p>统计每类短板涉及的学生人数，辅助教师设计分层教学与共性攻关（如「代码诊所」「BI 找茬」）。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1.3fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔥 各类短板涉及人数</h3></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="heatBar"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📋 教学攻关建议</h3></div>
          ${arr.slice(0,5).map(a=>`<div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">${a.icon} ${a.label}</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:var(--weak)">${a.n}人</span></div>
            <p class="helper" style="margin-top:6px">建议安排共性攻关 / 推送专项资源包，对 R 级学生启动 48 小时一对一靶向辅导。</p></div>`).join("")}
        </div>
      </div>`;
    mkBar("heatBar",arr.map(a=>a.label.replace(/能力弱|不足/g,"").slice(0,7)),[{label:"涉及人数",data:arr.map(a=>a.n),backgroundColor:"#ef5a6a",borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:STUDENTS.length});
  }
  else if(state.nav==="module"){
    renderModule();
  }
  else if(state.nav==="kmap"){
    renderTeacherKmap();
  }
}

/* 教学任务分析：总体 + 按教案任务模块下钻 */
function renderModule(){
  destroyCharts();
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  const chips=`<div class="chips" style="margin-bottom:18px">
    <span class="chip ${state.moduleTask===0?"active":""}" data-mtask="0">📦 总体分析</span>
    ${TASKS.map(t=>`<span class="chip ${state.moduleTask===t.id?"active":""}" data-mtask="${t.id}">${t.demo?"★ ":""}${t.short}</span>`).join("")}
  </div>`;

  if(state.moduleTask===0){
    // 总体：八大任务对比
    const r=rng(99);
    const completion=TASKS.map(()=>clamp(82+r()*16));
    const quality=TASKS.map(t=>Math.round(avg(STUDENTS.map(s=>taskScore(s,t.id)))));
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 教学任务分析</div><h2>教学任务分析 · 总体</h2><p>「采→治→析→报」八大教学任务的提交率与平均达成分。点上方任务名可下钻到单个任务的学情分析。★ 为本学期课堂展示任务。</p></div>
      ${chips}
      <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>✅ 各任务提交率 与 平均达成分</h3><span class="tag demo">★ 课堂展示任务</span></div><div class="chart-box lg"><canvas id="taskBar"></canvas></div></div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>📋 八大任务一览（点「查看」进入单任务分析）</h3></div>
        <div class="tbl-wrap"><table><thead><tr><th>任务</th><th>核心技能</th><th>主讲教师</th><th>提交率</th><th>平均达成分</th><th>状态</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>
        ${TASKS.map((t,i)=>{const tch=TEACHERS.find(x=>x.tasks.includes(t.id));return `<tr><td><b>${t.name}</b></td><td style="color:var(--ink-2);max-width:230px">${TASK_FOCUS[t.id].skills}</td><td>${tch?tch.name:"-"}</td><td class="sc-num">${completion[i]}%</td><td class="sc-num">${quality[i]}</td><td>${t.demo?`<span class="tag demo">★ 课堂展示</span>`:`<span class="status-pill done">已完成</span>`}</td><td><button class="btn-view" data-mtask="${t.id}">查看</button></td></tr>`;}).join("")}
        </tbody></table></div>
      </div>`;
    mkBar("taskBar",TASKS.map(t=>t.short),[
      {label:"提交率%",data:completion,backgroundColor:"#16b6a4",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"平均达成分",data:quality,backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
    ]);
  }else{
    // 单任务模块分析
    const t=TASKS.find(x=>x.id===state.moduleTask);
    const f=TASK_FOCUS[t.id];
    const tch=TEACHERS.find(x=>x.tasks.includes(t.id));
    const scored=STUDENTS.map(s=>({s,sc:taskScore(s,t.id)})).sort((a,b)=>b.sc-a.sc);
    const aCnt=scored.filter(x=>x.sc>=75).length, rCnt=scored.filter(x=>x.sc<60).length;
    const r=rng(t.id*13+5);
    const submit=clamp(82+r()*16);
    const focusLabels={finReport:"财务指标",dupont:"杜邦分析",bizFlow:"业务认知",internalControl:"内控流程",modelTheory:"模型理论",rpa:"RPA采集",powerQuery:"PQ清洗",dax:"DAX建模",report:"报告路演",purchaseRisk:"采购风险",salesRisk:"销售风险",cashRisk:"资金分析",compliance:"数据合规",skepticism:"职业怀疑",integrity:"诚信执业",teamwork:"团队协作",responsibility:"责任担当"};
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">教师工作台 / 教学任务分析 / 单任务</div><h2>${t.name} ${t.demo?'<span class="tag demo" style="vertical-align:middle">★ 课堂展示</span>':''}</h2>
        <p>核心技能：${f.skills}　|　主讲教师：<b>${tch?tch.name:"-"}</b>　|　素养主线：${f.lit}　|　交付物：${f.deliver}</p></div>
      ${chips}
      <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>📊 任务平均达成分</label><div class="v">${Math.round(avg(scored.map(x=>x.sc)))}<small>/100</small></div><div class="trend flat">聚焦本任务能力项</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>🅰️ A级（合格交付）</label><div class="v">${aCnt}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend up">≥75分</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--weak)"></div><label>🆁 R级（需整改）</label><div class="v">${rCnt}<small> 人</small></div><div class="trend flat">&lt;60分 启动靶向辅导</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>✅ 提交率</label><div class="v">${submit}<small>%</small></div><div class="trend flat">青蓝云平台记录</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>📈 本任务达成分分布</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="mDist"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🎯 本任务聚焦能力（班级均值）</h3><span class="sub">vs 岗位标准线 80</span></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="mFocus"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>👥 学生本任务学情（共${STUDENTS.length}人）</h3><span class="sub">点姓名查看完整成长画像</span></div>
        <div class="tbl-wrap"><table><thead><tr><th>学生</th><th>审计部门</th><th>任务达成分</th><th>评级</th><th>本任务薄弱项</th><th>建议</th><th></th></tr></thead><tbody>
        ${scored.map(({s,sc})=>{const ar=sc>=75?"A":sc>=60?"·":"R";
          const weak=f.metrics.map(k=>({k,v:s.met[k]})).sort((a,b)=>a.v-b.v)[0];
          const wlabel=focusLabels[weak.k]||weak.k;
          return `<tr>
            <td><div class="row-name"><span class="mini-av" style="background:${avColor(s.id)}">${avInit(s.name)}</span>${s.name}</div></td>
            <td style="color:var(--ink-2)">${GROUPS[s.group]}</td>
            <td><span class="sc-num" style="font-size:15px;color:${sc>=75?'var(--strong)':sc>=60?'var(--growth)':'var(--weak)'}">${sc}</span></td>
            <td>${ar==="A"?'<span class="ar-badge ar-A">A级</span>':ar==="R"?'<span class="ar-badge ar-R">R级</span>':'<span class="status-pill done">达标</span>'}</td>
            <td>${weak.v<72?`<span class="wk-tag">${wlabel} ${weak.v}</span>`:`<span class="wk-ok">✓ 无明显短板</span>`}</td>
            <td style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-2)">${weak.v<72?"推送"+wlabel+"专项练习":"可挑战拓展任务"}</td>
            <td><button class="btn-view" data-stu="${s.id}">画像</button></td>
          </tr>`;}).join("")}
        </tbody></table></div>
      </div>`;
    // 分布直方
    const buckets=[0,0,0,0];
    scored.forEach(x=>{const L=levelOf(x.sc).key;buckets[{weak:0,growth:1,strong:2,elite:3}[L]]++;});
    mkBar("mDist",LEVELS.map(L=>L.n),[{label:"人数",data:buckets,backgroundColor:LEVELS.map(L=>L.hex),borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:Math.max(...buckets)+3});
    const fm=f.metrics.map(k=>({lbl:focusLabels[k]||k,v:Math.round(avg(STUDENTS.map(s=>s.met[k])))}));
    mkBar("mFocus",fm.map(x=>x.lbl),[
      {label:"班级均值",data:fm.map(x=>x.v),backgroundColor:"#3d6ef0",borderRadius:6},
      {label:"岗位标准",data:fm.map(()=>80),backgroundColor:"#ffd23d",borderRadius:6},
    ]);
  }
}

/* ============================================================
   企业导师端
   ============================================================ */
function renderMentor(){
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  if(state.nav==="score"){
    const g=GROUP_EVAL[state.mentorGroup];
    const d=state.draft;
    const comp=Math.round(d.report*0.4+d.roadshow*0.3+d.defense*0.3);
    const ar=comp>=75?"A":"R";
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">企业导师工作台 / 审计部门成果评分</div><h2>审计部门成果评分</h2><p>对小组的咨询报告、路演表现、答辩表现进行评分与反馈。参照 ISO 9001，评级分 A（审计级·合格交付）与 R（返工级·整改）。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🏢 选择审计部门</h3></div>
          ${GROUP_EVAL.map(x=>`<div class="grp-card ${x.id===state.mentorGroup?"sel":""}" data-grp="${x.id}" style="margin-bottom:10px">
            <div class="gt">${x.name} <span class="status-pill ${x.evaluated?"done":"pend"}">${x.evaluated?"已评":"待评"}</span></div>
            <div class="gm">项目经理：${groupLeaderName(x.id)} · ${x.size}人 · 组均信号分 ${x.gc}</div></div>`).join("")}
        </div>
        <div class="card pad-lg">
          <div class="card-h"><h3>📝 ${g.name} · 评分</h3><span class="ar-badge ar-${ar}">${ar}级 · ${ar==="A"?"审计级（合格交付）":"返工级（需整改）"}</span></div>
          <div style="display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:8px">
            <div style="font-family:var(--font-d);font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-2);line-height:1.8"><b>项目经理：</b>${groupLeaderName(state.mentorGroup)}<br><b>成员：</b>${groupRosterPlain(state.mentorGroup)}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="score-input"><label>📄 咨询报告质量</label><input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="${d.report}" id="rg-report"><span class="num" id="num-report">${d.report}</span></div>
          <div class="score-input"><label>🎤 路演表现</label><input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="${d.roadshow}" id="rg-roadshow"><span class="num" id="num-roadshow">${d.roadshow}</span></div>
          <div class="score-input"><label>🗣️ 答辩表现</label><input type="range" min="0" max="100" value="${d.defense}" id="rg-defense"><span class="num" id="num-defense">${d.defense}</span></div>
          <div style="background:var(--surface-2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;margin:10px 0;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center">
            <span style="font-weight:600;font-size:13.5px">审计部门综合评分（报告40%·路演30%·答辩30%）</span>
            <span class="sc-num" style="font-size:26px;color:${comp>=75?'var(--strong)':'var(--weak)'}">${comp}</span>
          </div>
          <label style="font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-2);display:block;margin-bottom:7px">💬 评价反馈</label>
          <textarea class="ta" id="fb" placeholder="从商业价值、落地可行性、证据链、职业怀疑等角度给出反馈...">${d.feedback}</textarea>
          <div style="margin-top:16px;display:flex;gap:10px"><button class="btn primary" id="submitEval">提交评价</button><button class="btn ghost" id="resetEval">重置</button></div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    ["report","roadshow","defense"].forEach(k=>{
      const rg=document.getElementById("rg-"+k);
      rg.oninput=e=>{state.draft[k]=+e.target.value;document.getElementById("num-"+k).textContent=e.target.value;renderMentor();};
    });
    document.getElementById("fb").oninput=e=>{state.draft.feedback=e.target.value;};
    document.getElementById("resetEval").onclick=()=>{state.draft={report:80,roadshow:80,defense:80,feedback:""};renderMentor();};
    document.getElementById("submitEval").onclick=()=>{
      const gg=GROUP_EVAL[state.mentorGroup];
      gg.evaluated=true;gg.report=state.draft.report;gg.roadshow=state.draft.roadshow;gg.defense=state.draft.defense;gg.feedback=state.draft.feedback||"（暂无文字反馈）";
      alert("✅ 已提交对「"+gg.name+"」的评价，综合评分 "+comp+"（"+ar+"级）。该成绩将计入学生「企业导师评价」数据，并影响其综合信号分。");
      state.nav="records";render();
    };
  }
  else if(state.nav==="records"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">企业导师工作台 / 已提交评价</div><h2>已提交评价记录</h2><p>企业导师评价权重占 30%，重点评价咨询成果的商业价值与落地可行性。</p></div>
      <div class="card"><div class="tbl-wrap"><table><thead><tr><th>审计部门</th><th>组长</th><th>咨询报告</th><th>路演</th><th>答辩</th><th>综合</th><th>ISO评级</th><th>反馈</th></tr></thead><tbody>
        ${GROUP_EVAL.filter(g=>g.evaluated).map(g=>{const c=Math.round(g.report*0.4+g.roadshow*0.3+g.defense*0.3);const ar=c>=75?"A":"R";return `<tr>
          <td><b>${g.name}</b></td><td>${groupLeaderName(g.id)}</td><td class="sc-num">${g.report}</td><td class="sc-num">${g.roadshow}</td><td class="sc-num">${g.defense}</td>
          <td><span class="sc-num" style="color:${c>=75?'var(--strong)':'var(--weak)'};font-size:15px">${c}</span></td>
          <td><span class="ar-badge ar-${ar}">${ar}级</span></td>
          <td style="color:var(--ink-2);max-width:320px;font-size:12.5px">${g.feedback}</td></tr>`;}).join("")}
      </tbody></table></div>
      ${GROUP_EVAL.filter(g=>g.evaluated).length===0?`<div class="no-weak"><div class="big">🗃️</div>暂无评价记录</div>`:""}
      </div>`;
  }
}

/* ============================================================
   管理员端
   ============================================================ */
function renderAdmin(){
  const main=document.getElementById("main");
  if(state.nav==="lib"){
    const block=(cls,d)=>`
      <div class="std-dim ${cls}">
        <div class="hd"><h3>${d.name}</h3><span class="ww">权重 ${d.weight}% · 对应强信号：${d.strong}</span></div>
        ${d.items.map(it=>`<div class="std-row"><div class="it">${it.it}</div><div class="desc">${it.desc}</div><div><span class="strong-sig">达标即强信号</span></div></div>`).join("")}
      </div>`;
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">管理员工作台 / 岗位信号标准库</div><h2>审计行业岗位信号标准库</h2><p>对接会计师事务所「助理数字化审计咨询师」岗位，把行业人才要求转化为知识·能力·素养三维评价标准——给学生一张「岗位能力地图」。</p></div>
      ${block("k",STD_LIB.k)}${block("a",STD_LIB.a)}${block("l",STD_LIB.l)}`;
  }
  else if(state.nav==="rule"){
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">管理员工作台 / 评分规则配置</div><h2>评分规则与信号等级配置</h2><p>综合信号分 = 知识×30% + 能力×45% + 素养×25%。能力维度权重最高，体现「能完成真实任务」的岗位导向。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>⚖️ 三维权重</h3></div>
          <div class="chart-box"><canvas id="wPie"></canvas></div>
          <div class="dim3" style="margin-top:14px">
            <div class="dim k"><div class="dname">知识</div><div class="dval" style="color:var(--blue)">30%</div></div>
            <div class="dim a"><div class="dname">能力</div><div class="dval" style="color:var(--teal)">45%</div></div>
            <div class="dim l"><div class="dname">素养</div><div class="dval" style="color:var(--lemon-deep)">25%</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🚦 信号等级阈值</h3></div>
          ${LEVELS.map(L=>`<div class="ds-row"><span class="lv-pill" style="background:${L.hex}18;color:${L.hex};width:auto;margin-right:10px"><span class="d" style="background:${L.hex}"></span>${L.n}学员</span><div class="track"><i style="width:${L.k==='weak'?'30':L.k==='growth'?'67':L.k==='strong'?'82':'95'}%;background:${L.hex}"></i></div><div class="vv" style="width:60px">${L.r}</div></div>`).join("")}
          <div style="margin-top:16px;background:var(--surface-2);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:14px">
            <b style="font-size:13.5px">🔄 信号增强闭环</b>
            <p class="helper" style="margin-top:6px">弱信号 → 平台诊断短板 → 推送专项资源 → 完成训练 → 再次评价 → 信号增强。配合 ISO 9001 的 A/R 分级，让学生从「分数考核」走向「能力与品格双重认证」。</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>`;
    mkDoughnut("wPie",["知识 30%","能力 45%","素养 25%"],[30,45,25],["#3d6ef0","#16b6a4","#ffd23d"]);
  }
  else if(state.nav==="data"){
    const dist=levelDist();
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">管理员工作台 / 平台运行概览</div><h2>平台运行概览</h2><p>《财务大数据分析》课程 · 全平台运行数据。</p></div>
      <div class="kpis" style="margin-bottom:18px">
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--blue)"></div><label>🎓 在册学生</label><div class="v">${STUDENTS.length}</div><div class="trend flat">${CLASS_NAME}</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--teal)"></div><label>👥 审计部门</label><div class="v">${GROUPS.length}</div><div class="trend flat">学徒制部门化</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--lemon-deep)"></div><label>📚 标准库能力项</label><div class="v">${STD_LIB.k.items.length+STD_LIB.a.items.length+STD_LIB.l.items.length}</div><div class="trend flat">知识+能力+素养</div></div>
        <div class="kpi"><div class="ribbon" style="background:var(--strong)"></div><label>📈 全链路任务</label><div class="v">${TASKS.length}</div><div class="trend flat">采→治→析→报</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔵 全平台信号等级分布</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="aDist"></canvas></div></div>
        <div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>👤 角色账号分布</h3></div><div class="chart-box"><canvas id="aRole"></canvas></div></div>
      </div>`;
    mkDoughnut("aDist",LEVELS.map(L=>`${L.n}（${dist[L.k]}）`),LEVELS.map(L=>dist[L.k]),LEVELS.map(L=>L.hex));
    mkBar("aRole",["学生","教师","企业导师","管理员"],[{label:"账号数",data:[STUDENTS.length,TEACHERS.length,3,1],backgroundColor:["#3d6ef0","#16b6a4","#f5b400","#6366f1"],borderRadius:6}],{legend:false,max:STUDENTS.length});
  }
  else if(state.nav==="roles"){
    const roleDesc=[
      {icon:"🎓",t:"学生",d:"查看合并后的成长画像（画像+能力雷达+成长曲线）、进入课业实训完成课前云训/课中实训/课后岗训，查看评价与改进建议，使用柠檬AI助教答疑。",n:STUDENTS.length},
      {icon:"📊",t:"教师",d:"按教案任务模块查看学情与总体分析，管理课前云训、课中实训、课后岗训的提交和批改，查看全班信号分布、短板、知识能力素养达成，下钻每位学生成长画像。任课教师：胡老师、凌老师、符老师、解老师。",n:TEACHERS.length},
      {icon:"🏢",t:"企业导师",d:"对小组咨询报告、路演、答辩进行评分与反馈，评价权重 30%，把关商业价值与落地性。",n:3},
      {icon:"⚙️",t:"管理员",d:"维护岗位信号标准库、配置评分规则与信号等级阈值，掌握平台运行数据。",n:1},
    ];
    main.innerHTML=`
      <div class="page-head"><div class="crumb">管理员工作台 / 角色与账号</div><h2>角色与账号管理</h2><p>平台四类角色协同：标准定信号 · 数据识信号 · 智能强信号。</p></div>
      <div class="grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:18px" class="col-2">
        ${roleDesc.map(r=>`<div class="card"><div class="card-h"><h3>${r.icon} ${r.t}</h3><span class="tag lemon">${r.n} 个账号</span></div><p class="helper" style="font-size:13px;line-height:1.7">${r.d}</p></div>`).join("")}
      </div>`;
  }
}

/* ============================================================
   主渲染
   ============================================================ */
function render(){
  destroyCharts();
  const login=document.getElementById("loginScreen");
  const app=document.querySelector(".app");
  if(!state.loggedIn){
    if(login) login.style.display="flex";
    if(app) app.style.display="none";
    return;
  }
  if(login) login.style.display="none";
  if(app) app.style.display="flex";
  renderRoleSwitch();renderWho();renderSidebar();
  if(state.role==="student")renderStudent();
  else if(state.role==="teacher")renderTeacher();
  else if(state.role==="mentor")renderMentor();
  else renderAdmin();
}

/* 事件委托 */
document.addEventListener("click",e=>{
  const lr=e.target.closest("[data-login-role]");
  if(lr){
    state.loginRole=lr.dataset.loginRole;
    document.querySelectorAll(".login-role").forEach(x=>x.classList.toggle("active",x.dataset.loginRole===state.loginRole));
    return;
  }
  if(e.target.id==="loginBtn"){
    const acc=document.getElementById("loginAccount").value.trim();
    const pwd=document.getElementById("loginPassword").value.trim();
    const err=document.getElementById("loginError");
    if(acc==="12345"&&pwd==="12345"){
      state.loggedIn=true;state.role=state.loginRole;state.nav=NAV[state.role][0].key;
      if(err)err.textContent="";
      render();
    }else if(err){err.textContent="账号或密码错误，请输入 12345 / 12345。";}
    return;
  }
  if(e.target.id==="logoutBtn"){
    state.loggedIn=false;state.role="student";state.loginRole="student";state.nav="overview";
    render();
    setTimeout(()=>{document.querySelectorAll(".login-role").forEach(x=>x.classList.toggle("active",x.dataset.loginRole==="student"));},0);
    return;
  }
  const rb=e.target.closest("[data-role]");
  if(rb){state.role=rb.dataset.role;state.nav=NAV[state.role][0].key;render();return;}
  const nb=e.target.closest("[data-nav]");
  if(nb){state.nav=nb.dataset.nav;render();return;}
  const mt=e.target.closest("[data-mtask]");
  if(mt){state.moduleTask=+mt.dataset.mtask;state.nav="module";renderModule();return;}
  const tph=e.target.closest("[data-train-phase]");
  if(tph){state.trainingPhase=tph.dataset.trainPhase;render();return;}
  const ttk=e.target.closest("[data-train-task]");
  if(ttk){state.trainingTask=+ttk.dataset.trainTask;render();return;}
  const dqi=e.target.closest("[data-dq-img]");
  if(dqi){openDQImage(dqi.dataset.dqImg,dqi.dataset.dqTitle||"数据质量问题清单");return;}
  if(e.target.id==="xieGradeBtn"){openXieTask8GradeModal();return;}
  const kp=e.target.closest("[data-kpt]");
  if(kp){state.kmapPoint=kp.dataset.kpt;if(state.role==="teacher")renderTeacherKmap();else if(state.nav==="diag")renderStudentDiag();else renderStudentKmap();return;}
  const sv=e.target.closest("[data-stu]");
  if(sv){openStudentModal(+sv.dataset.stu);return;}
  const gp=e.target.closest("[data-grp]");
  if(gp){state.mentorGroup=+gp.dataset.grp;const g=GROUP_EVAL[state.mentorGroup];state.draft={report:g.report,roadshow:g.roadshow,defense:g.defense,feedback:g.feedback};renderMentor();return;}
  if(e.target.id==="modalMask"||e.target.classList.contains("x")){closeModal();}
});

function openStudentModal(id){
  const s=STUDENTS[id];
  document.getElementById("modalBody").innerHTML=`
    <button class="x">✕</button>
    <div class="page-head" style="margin-bottom:16px"><div class="crumb">学生成长画像</div><h2 style="font-size:21px">${s.name} · ${GROUPS[s.group]} · ${s.groupRole||"审计助理"}</h2></div>
    ${profileHTML(s,"tm")}
    <div class="card" style="margin-top:18px"><div class="card-h"><h3>🔍 短板与推荐</h3></div>
      ${weaknessesOf(s).length? weaknessesOf(s).map(w=>`<div class="weak-item"><div class="top"><span class="name">${w.icon} ${w.label}</span><span class="score-pill" style="color:${w.sev==='high'?'var(--weak)':'var(--growth)'}">${w.score}</span></div><div class="res-list">${w.res.map(r=>`<div class="res"><span class="pic">▶</span>${r}</div>`).join("")}</div></div>`).join("") : `<div class="no-weak"><div class="big">🎉</div>各项能力均达标</div>`}
    </div>`;
  document.getElementById("modalMask").classList.add("show");
  mountProfile(s,"tm");
}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById("modalMask").classList.remove("show");}

render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
